split_note: LOFO across families with >=10 compounds: ['other', 'polyanionic_phosphate']. For each, hold the family out, learn the global mean signed error on the remaining compounds, apply it to the held-out family.

primary_metric.definition: held-out MAE upper edge of 95% bootstrap CI (conservative)

verdict_string: INVALIDATED by failure mode(s): F1 (see below)
caveat: Reference voltages are MP `average_voltage`, DFT-computed (PBE/PBE+U), NOT experimental. Step 3 will replace with literature-experimental V_avg on the 28 mainstream subset, which may shift the verdict by up to ~0.15 V per F3 / revision-trigger criteria in the pre-registration.
na3v2po43_note: Na3V2(PO4)3 is NOT in the OOS set. The audit's '2.90 V vs ~3.4 V exp' is a separate QME PBE+U DFT result and is out of scope here.
